englishDefinitions: Military slang for a wound serious enough to send a soldier back home from combat, but not life-threatening or permanently disabling.
An injury that results in a lucky or beneficial outcome.
persianTranslation: زخم طلایی (زخمی که سرباز را به خانه می‌فرستد)
examples: Soldiers sometimes call a minor but debilitating wound a 'million dollar wound' because it sends them home safely.
He joked that the ankle injury he got during training was his million dollar wound — it got him out of the field.
The term 'million dollar wound' reflects the grim humor soldiers use to cope with dangerous situations.
